sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the player moved LEFT and is now in the middle of the blue region. The purple region at the bottom is still visible (partial width on left).
Now I need to click the bottom green blocks while the purple region is active. The bottom green blocks are at rows 39 and 45, columns 15, 21, 27, 33.
Let me try clicking these 8 bottom green blocks first. If this works, the board might transform again or the purple region might expand, allowing me to click the remaining green blocks.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click bottom green blocks (rows 39 and 45) while purple region is active
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 21},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 27},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 39, 'col': 33},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 21},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 27},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 33}
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
